          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import event, text\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import (\n    AsyncEngine,\n    AsyncSession,\n    async_sessionmaker,\n    create_async_engine,\n)\n\nfrom miniq.db.models import Base\n\n\ndef create_engine(database_url: str) -> AsyncEngine:\n    engine = create_async_engine(database_url, future=True, pool_pre_ping=REDACTED    @event.listens_for(engine.sync_engine, \"connect\")\n    def _set_sqlite_pragmas(dbapi_connection: object, _connection_record: object) -> None:\n        cursor = dbapi_connection.cursor()\n        cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA journal_mode=REDACTED;\")\n        cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA synchronous=REDACTED;\")\n        cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA foreign_keys=REDACTED;\")\n        cursor.execute(\"PRAGMA busy_timeout=REDACTED;\")\n        cursor.close()\n\n    return engine\n\n\ndef create_session_factory(engine: AsyncEngine) -> async_sessionmaker[AsyncSession]:\n    return async_sessionmaker(engine, expire_on_commit=False, autoflush=REDACTED def init_db(engine: AsyncEngine) -> None:\n    async with engine.begin() as conn:\n        await conn.run_sync(Base.metadata.create_all)\n        await conn.execute(text(\"PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);\"))\n\n\nasync def ensure_db_parent(path: Path) -> None:\n    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=REDACTED"

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import and_, desc, func, or_, select, update\nfrom sqlalchemy.exc import IntegrityError\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker\n\nfrom miniq.db.models import Job, JobEvent, ScheduleTick\nfrom miniq.db.state_machine import require_transition\nfrom miniq.enums import ACTIVE_STATES, JobState\nfrom miniq.utils import new_job_id, utc_now\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True, frozen=REDACTED JobPage:\n    items: list[Job]\n    next_cursor: str | None\n\n\nclass JobRepository:\n    def __init__(self, session_factory: async_sessionmaker[AsyncSession]) -> None:\n        self._session_factory = session_factory\n\n    async def create_job(\n        self,\n        *,\n        job_id: str,\n        job_type: str,\n        queue: str,\n        payload: dict[str, Any],\n        max_attempts: int,\n        next_run_at: datetime,\n        idempotency_key: str | None,\n        schedule_id: str | None = None,\n        schedule: str | None = None,\n        message: str = \"job queued\",\n    ) -> Job:\n        now = utc_now()\n        job = Job(\n            id=REDACTED,\n            type=REDACTED,\n            queue=REDACTED,\n            payload=REDACTED,\n            state=REDACTED,\n            created_at=REDACTED,\n            updated_at=REDACTED,\n            idempotency_key=REDACTED,\n            attempts=REDACTED,\n            max_attempts=REDACTED,\n            next_run_at=REDACTED,\n            schedule_id=REDACTED,\n            schedule=REDACTED,\n        )\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            try:\n                async with session.begin():\n                    session.add(job)\n                    session.add(\n                        JobEvent(\n                            job_id=REDACTED,\n                            old_state=None,\n                            new_state=REDACTED,\n                            message=REDACTED,\n                            metadata=REDACTED\"queue\": queue, \"job_type\": job_type},\n                        )\n                    )\n            except IntegrityError:\n                await session.rollback()\n                raise\n            await session.refresh(job)\n            return job\n\n    async def get_job(self, job_id: str) -> Job | None:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            return await session.get(Job, job_id)\n\n    async def get_active_job_by_idempotency_key(self, idempotency_key: str) -> Job | None:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = (\n                select(Job)\n                .where(\n                    Job.idempotency_key == idempotency_key,\n                    Job.state.in_([state.value for state in ACTIVE_STATES]),\n                )\n                .order_by(desc(Job.created_at))\n                .limit(1)\n            )\n            return (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\n\n    async def list_jobs(\n        self,\n        *,\n        state: str | None,\n        job_type: str | None,\n        limit: int,\n        cursor_created_at: datetime | None,\n        cursor_id: str | None,\n    ) -> list[Job]:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = select(Job)\n            if state is not None:\n                stmt = stmt.where(Job.state == state)\n            if job_type is not None:\n                stmt = stmt.where(Job.type == job_type)\n            if cursor_created_at is not None and cursor_id is not None:\n                stmt = stmt.where(\n                    or_(\n                        Job.created_at < cursor_created_at,\n                        and_(Job.created_at == cursor_created_at, Job.id < cursor_id),\n                    )\n                )\n            stmt = stmt.order_by(desc(Job.created_at), desc(Job.id)).limit(limit)\n            return list((await session.execute(stmt)).scalars().all())\n\n    async def list_events(\n        self,\n        *,\n        job_id: str | None,\n        after_id: int,\n        limit: int,\n    ) -> list[JobEvent]:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = select(JobEvent).where(JobEvent.id > after_id)\n            if job_id is not None:\n                stmt = stmt.where(JobEvent.job_id == job_id)\n            stmt = stmt.order_by(JobEvent.id.asc()).limit(limit)\n            return list((await session.execute(stmt)).scalars().all())\n\n    async def mark_job_enqueued(self, *, job_id: str, stream_id: str) -> None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                await session.execute(\n                    update(Job)\n                    .where(Job.id == job_id, Job.broker_enqueued_at.is_(None))\n                    .values(broker_enqueued_at=REDACTED, updated_at=REDACTED, last_stream_id=REDACTED                )\n\n    async def get_due_unenqueued_jobs(self, *, now: datetime, limit: int) -> list[Job]:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = (\n                select(Job)\n                .where(\n                    Job.state == JobState.QUEUED.value,\n                    Job.broker_enqueued_at.is_(None),\n                    Job.next_run_at <= now,\n                )\n                .order_by(Job.next_run_at.asc(), Job.created_at.asc())\n                .limit(limit)\n            )\n            return list((await session.execute(stmt)).scalars().all())\n\n    async def count_due_jobs_by_queue(self, *, now: datetime) -> list[tuple[str, int]]:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = (\n                select(Job.queue, func.count(Job.id))\n                .where(\n                    Job.state == JobState.QUEUED.value,\n                    Job.next_run_at <= now,\n                )\n                .group_by(Job.queue)\n            )\n            rows = (await session.execute(stmt)).all()\n            return [(queue, count) for queue, count in rows]\n\n    async def claim_for_execution(\n        self, *, job_id: str, stream_id: str, consumer: str\n    ) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                result = await session.execute(\n                    update(Job)\n                    .where(Job.id == job_id, Job.state == JobState.QUEUED.value)\n                    .values(\n                        state=REDACTED,\n                        attempts=REDACTED + 1,\n                        updated_at=REDACTED,\n                        last_stream_id=REDACTED,\n                    )\n                )\n                if result.rowcount != 1:\n                    return None\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                assert job is not None\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job started\",\n                        metadata=REDACTED                            \"consumer\": consumer,\n                            \"stream_id\": stream_id,\n                            \"attempt\": job.attempts,\n                        },\n                    )\n                )\n            assert job is not None\n            return job\n\n    async def complete_job(self, *, job_id: str, result_payload: dict[str, Any]) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                if job.state != JobState.RUNNING.value:\n                    return job\n                require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.SUCCEEDED)\n                old_state = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.SUCCEEDED.value\n                job.result = result_payload\n                job.last_error = None\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.finished_at = now\n                job.cancel_requested = False\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job succeeded\",\n                        metadata=REDACTED\"result\": result_payload},\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def fail_and_requeue(\n        self,\n        *,\n        job_id: str,\n        error_message: str,\n        next_run_at: datetime,\n    ) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None or job.state != JobState.RUNNING.value:\n                    return job\n                require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.FAILED)\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job failed\",\n                        metadata=REDACTED\"error\": error_message, \"attempt\": job.attempts},\n                    )\n                )\n                require_transition(JobState.FAILED, JobState.QUEUED)\n                job.state = JobState.QUEUED.value\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.next_run_at = next_run_at\n                job.last_error = error_message\n                job.result = None\n                job.broker_enqueued_at = None\n                job.last_stream_id = None\n                job.finished_at = None\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job requeued\",\n                        metadata=REDACTED\"next_run_at\": next_run_at.isoformat()},\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def mark_dead(self, *, job_id: str, error_message: str) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                if job.state != JobState.RUNNING.value:\n                    return job\n                require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.DEAD)\n                old_state = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.DEAD.value\n                job.last_error = error_message\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.finished_at = now\n                job.broker_enqueued_at = None\n                job.last_stream_id = None\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"job exhausted retries\",\n                        metadata=REDACTED\"error\": error_message, \"attempt\": job.attempts},\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def mark_running_canceled(self, *, job_id: str, message: str) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                if job.state != JobState.RUNNING.value:\n                    return job\n                require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.CANCELED)\n                old_state = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.CANCELED.value\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.finished_at = now\n                job.cancel_requested = True\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED,\n                        metadata=None,\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def cancel_job(self, *, job_id: str) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                if job.state == JobState.QUEUED.value:\n                    require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.CANCELED)\n                    old_state = job.state\n                    job.state = JobState.CANCELED.value\n                    job.updated_at = now\n                    job.finished_at = now\n                    job.cancel_requested = True\n                    session.add(\n                        JobEvent(\n                            job_id=REDACTED,\n                            old_state=REDACTED,\n                            new_state=REDACTED,\n                            message=REDACTED\"job canceled before execution\",\n                            metadata=None,\n                        )\n                    )\n                    return job\n                if job.state == JobState.RUNNING.value:\n                    job.cancel_requested = True\n                    job.updated_at = now\n                    session.add(\n                        JobEvent(\n                            job_id=REDACTED,\n                            old_state=REDACTED,\n                            new_state=REDACTED,\n                            message=REDACTED\"cancel requested\",\n                            metadata=None,\n                        )\n                    )\n                    return job\n                return job\n\n    async def retry_job(self, *, job_id: str, next_run_at: datetime) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\n                if job is None:\n                    return None\n                if job.state not in {JobState.FAILED.value, JobState.DEAD.value}:\n                    return job\n                require_transition(JobState(job.state), JobState.QUEUED)\n                old_state = job.state\n                job.state = JobState.QUEUED.value\n                job.attempts = 0\n                job.next_run_at = next_run_at\n                job.updated_at = now\n                job.finished_at = None\n                job.cancel_requested = False\n                job.result = None\n                job.last_error = None\n                job.broker_enqueued_at = None\n                job.last_stream_id = None\n                job.dlq_published_at = None\n                session.add(\n                    JobEvent(\n                        job_id=REDACTED,\n                        old_state=REDACTED,\n                        new_state=REDACTED,\n                        message=REDACTED\"manual retry queued\",\n                        metadata=REDACTED\"next_run_at\": next_run_at.isoformat()},\n                    )\n                )\n            return job\n\n    async def is_cancel_requested(self, *, job_id: str) -> bool:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = select(Job.cancel_requested).where(Job.id == job_id)\n            value = (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\n            return bool(value)\n\n    async def mark_dlq_published(self, *, job_id: str) -> None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            async with session.begin():\n                await session.execute(\n                    update(Job)\n                    .where(Job.id == job_id, Job.dlq_published_at.is_(None))\n                    .values(dlq_published_at=REDACTED, updated_at=REDACTED                )\n\n    async def get_last_schedule_tick(self, *, schedule_id: str) -> datetime | None:\n        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            stmt = (\n                select(ScheduleTick.planned_time)\n                .where(ScheduleTick.schedule_id == schedule_id)\n                .order_by(ScheduleTick.planned_time.desc())\n                .limit(1)\n            )\n            return (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\n\n    async def create_schedule_job(\n        self,\n        *,\n        schedule_id: str,\n        schedule: str,\n        planned_time: datetime,\n        queue: str,\n        job_type: str,\n        payload: dict[str, Any],\n        max_attempts: int,\n    ) -> Job | None:\n        now = utc_now()\n        job = Job(\n            id=REDACTED,\n            type=REDACTED,\n            queue=REDACTED,\n            payload=REDACTED,\n            state=REDACTED,\n            created_at=REDACTED,\n            updated_at=REDACTED,\n            idempotency_key=None,\n            attempts=REDACTED,\n            max_attempts=REDACTED,\n            next_run_at=REDACTED,\n            schedule_id=REDACTED,\n            schedule=REDACTED,\n        )\n        tick = ScheduleTick(schedule_id=REDACTED, planned_time=REDACTED, job_id=REDACTED        async with self._session_factory() as session:\n            try:\n                async with session.begin():\n                    session.add(tick)\n                    session.add(job)\n                    session.add(\n                        JobEvent(\n                            job_id=REDACTED,\n                            old_state=None,\n                            new_state=REDACTED,\n                            message=REDACTED\"recurring job queued\",\n                            metadata=REDACTED                                \"schedule_id\": schedule_id,\n                                \"planned_time\": planned_time.isoformat(),\n                            },\n                        )\n                    )\n            except IntegrityError:\n                await session.rollback()\n                return None\n            await session.refresh(job)\n            return job\n"
        },

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import (\n    JSON,\n    Boolean,\n    DateTime,\n    ForeignKey,\n    Index,\n    Integer,\n    String,\n    Text,\n    UniqueConstraint,\n    text,\n)\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase, Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n\nfrom miniq.enums import JobState\nfrom miniq.utils import utc_now\n\n\nclass Base(DeclarativeBase):\n    pass\n\n\nclass Job(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"jobs\"\n    __table_args__ = (\n        Index(\n            \"ix_jobs_idempotency_active\",\n            \"idempotency_key\",\n            unique=True,\n            sqlite_where=REDACTED\"idempotency_key IS NOT NULL AND state IN ('QUEUED','RUNNING')\"),\n        ),\n    )\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=REDACTED    type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(128), nullable=False, index=REDACTED    queue: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=False, index=REDACTED    payload: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=REDACTED    state: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(16), nullable=False, index=REDACTED    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, default=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    )\n    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, default=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    )\n    idempotency_key: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=REDACTED    attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    max_attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    next_run_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, nullable=True, index=REDACTED    )\n    schedule: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=REDACTED    last_error: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=REDACTED    result: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=REDACTED    cancel_requested: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, nullable=REDACTED    broker_enqueued_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, nullable=True, index=REDACTED    )\n    last_stream_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=REDACTED    schedule_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True, index=REDACTED    finished_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    dlq_published_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    )\n\n    events: Mapped[list[JobEvent]] = relationship(\n        back_populates=REDACTED\"job\", cascade=REDACTED\"all, delete-orphan\"\n    )\n\n\nclass JobEvent(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"job_events\"\n\n    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=REDACTED    job_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(ForeignKey(\"jobs.id\", ondelete=REDACTED\"CASCADE\"), index=REDACTED    ts: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, default=REDACTED, nullable=False, index=REDACTED    )\n    old_state: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(16), nullable=REDACTED    new_state: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(16), nullable=REDACTED    message: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=REDACTED    metadata: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=REDACTED    job: Mapped[Job] = relationship(back_populates=REDACTED\"events\")\n\n\nclass ScheduleTick(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"schedule_ticks\"\n    __table_args__ = (UniqueConstraint(\"schedule_id\", \"planned_time\", name=REDACTED\"uq_schedule_tick\"),)\n\n    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=REDACTED    schedule_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False, index=REDACTED    planned_time: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, nullable=False, index=REDACTED    )\n    job_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(\n        String(36), ForeignKey(\"jobs.id\", ondelete=REDACTED\"SET NULL\"), nullable=REDACTED    )\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\n        DateTime(timezone=REDACTED, default=REDACTED, nullable=REDACTED    )\n\n\nALLOWED_TRANSITIONS: dict[JobState, set[JobState]] = {\n    JobState.QUEUED: {JobState.RUNNING, JobState.CANCELED},\n    JobState.RUNNING: {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.FAILED, JobState.CANCELED, JobState.DEAD},\n    JobState.FAILED: {JobState.QUEUED},\n    JobState.DEAD: {JobState.QUEUED},\n    JobState.SUCCEEDED: set(),\n    JobState.CANCELED: set(),\n}\n"

          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Broker package.\"\"\"\n"
        },

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom redis.asyncio import Redis\n\nfrom miniq.observability.metrics import jobs_enqueued_total\nfrom miniq.utils import utc_now\n\n\ndef stream_name(queue: str) -> str:\n    return f\"jobs:{queue}\"\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True, frozen=REDACTED StreamMessage:\n    queue: str\n    stream: str\n    stream_id: str\n    values: dict[str, str]\n\n\nclass RedisBroker:\n    def __init__(self, redis_client: Redis, *, group_name: str) -> None:\n        self._redis = redis_client\n        self._group_name = group_name\n\n    async def ping(self) -> bool:\n        return bool(await self._redis.ping())\n\n    async def ensure_group(self, queue: str) -> None:\n        name = stream_name(queue)\n        try:\n            await self._redis.xgroup_create(\n                name=REDACTED, groupname=REDACTED, id=REDACTED\"0\", mkstream=REDACTED            )\n        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001\n            if \"BUSYGROUP\" not in str(exc):\n                raise\n\n    async def enqueue(\n        self,\n        *,\n        queue: str,\n        job_id: str,\n        job_type: str,\n        enqueued_at: datetime | None = None,\n    ) -> str:\n        timestamp = (enqueued_at or utc_now()).isoformat()\n        message_id = await self._redis.xadd(\n            stream_name(queue),\n            {\n                \"job_id\": job_id,\n                \"queue\": queue,\n                \"type\": job_type,\n                \"enqueued_at\": timestamp,\n            },\n        )\n        jobs_enqueued_total.labels(type=REDACTED, queue=REDACTED        return message_id\n\n    async def publish_dlq(self, *, job_id: str, queue: str, job_type: str, reason: str) -> str:\n        return await self._redis.xadd(\n            \"jobs:dlq\",\n            {\n                \"job_id\": job_id,\n                \"queue\": queue,\n                \"type\": job_type,\n                \"reason\": reason,\n                \"published_at\": utc_now().isoformat(),\n            },\n        )\n\n    async def read_group(\n        self,\n        *,\n        queues: list[str],\n        consumer_name: str,\n        count: int,\n        block_ms: int,\n    ) -> list[StreamMessage]:\n        streams = {stream_name(queue): \">\" for queue in queues}\n        response = await self._redis.xreadgroup(\n            groupname=REDACTED,\n            consumername=REDACTED,\n            streams=REDACTED,\n            count=REDACTED,\n            block=REDACTED,\n        )\n        return self._normalize_messages(response)\n\n    async def reclaim(\n        self,\n        *,\n        queues: list[str],\n        consumer_name: str,\n        min_idle_time_ms: int,\n        count: int,\n    ) -> list[StreamMessage]:\n        reclaimed: list[StreamMessage] = []\n        for queue in queues:\n            name = stream_name(queue)\n            try:\n                response = await self._redis.xautoclaim(\n                    name=REDACTED,\n                    groupname=REDACTED,\n                    consumername=REDACTED,\n                    min_idle_time=REDACTED,\n                    start_id=REDACTED\"0-0\",\n                    count=REDACTED,\n                )\n            except TypeError:\n                pending = await self._redis.xpending_range(\n                    name,\n                    self._group_name,\n                    \"-\",\n                    \"+\",\n                    count,\n                    consumername=None,\n                )\n                ids = [item[\"message_id\"] for item in pending if item[\"idle\"] >= min_idle_time_ms]\n                if not ids:\n                    continue\n                claimed = await self._redis.xclaim(\n                    name,\n                    self._group_name,\n                    consumer_name,\n                    min_idle_time_ms,\n                    ids,\n                )\n                reclaimed.extend(\n                    self._normalize_messages(\n                        [\n                            (\n                                name,\n                                claimed,\n                            )\n                        ]\n                    )\n                )\n                continue\n            if isinstance(response, tuple) and len(response) >= 2:\n                messages = response[1]\n                reclaimed.extend(self._normalize_messages([(name, messages)]))\n        return reclaimed\n\n    async def ack(self, *, queue: str, stream_id: str) -> int:\n        return int(await self._redis.xack(stream_name(queue), self._group_name, stream_id))\n\n    async def close(self) -> None:\n        await self._redis.aclose()\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def _normalize_messages(response: Any) -> list[StreamMessage]:\n        normalized: list[StreamMessage] = []\n        for raw_stream, entries in response or []:\n            stream = raw_stream.decode() if isinstance(raw_stream, bytes) else raw_stream\n            queue = stream.split(\":\", 1)[1]\n            for raw_id, raw_values in entries:\n                stream_id = raw_id.decode() if isinstance(raw_id, bytes) else raw_id\n                values: dict[str, str] = {}\n                for key, value in raw_values.items():\n                    normalized[:]  # no-op to keep mypy happy with list inference in nested loop\n                    parsed_key = key.decode() if isinstance(key, bytes) else str(key)\n                    parsed_value = value.decode() if isinstance(value, bytes) else str(value)\n                    values[parsed_key] = parsed_value\n                normalized.append(\n                    StreamMessage(\n                        queue=REDACTED,\n                        stream=REDACTED,\n                        stream_id=REDACTED,\n                        values=REDACTED,\n                    )\n                )\n        return normalized\n"
        },

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom collections.abc import Iterable\n\nfrom prometheus_client import CONTENT_TYPE_LATEST, Counter, Gauge, Histogram, generate_latest\n\njobs_enqueued_total = Counter(\n    \"jobs_enqueued_total\",\n    \"Total jobs enqueued to Redis Streams.\",\n    labelnames=REDACTED\"type\", \"queue\"),\n)\njobs_started_total = Counter(\n    \"jobs_started_total\",\n    \"Total jobs started by workers.\",\n    labelnames=REDACTED\"type\",),\n)\njobs_finished_total = Counter(\n    \"jobs_finished_total\",\n    \"Total jobs finished by state.\",\n    labelnames=REDACTED\"type\", \"state\"),\n)\njob_duration_seconds = Histogram(\n    \"job_duration_seconds\",\n    \"Observed job execution duration in seconds.\",\n    labelnames=REDACTED\"type\",),\n    buckets=REDACTED, 0.05, 0.1, 0.5, 1, 2, 5, 10, 30, 60),\n)\nqueue_depth = Gauge(\n    \"queue_depth\",\n    \"Number of due queued jobs per queue.\",\n    labelnames=REDACTED\"queue\",),\n)\nworker_reclaims_total = Counter(\n    \"worker_reclaims_total\",\n    \"Number of Redis pending messages reclaimed by workers.\",\n)\nscheduler_enqueues_total = Counter(\n    \"scheduler_enqueues_total\",\n    \"Number of recurring schedule jobs created.\",\n    labelnames=REDACTED\"schedule_id\",),\n)\n\n\ndef set_queue_depths(depths: Iterable[tuple[str, int]]) -> None:\n    for queue_name, count in depths:\n        queue_depth.labels(queue=REDACTED render_metrics() -> tuple[bytes, str]:\n    return generate_latest(), CONTENT_TYPE_LATEST\n"
